scope: LES-003 learner practice experience and ASM-002 deterministic persisted assistance authority

acceptance.ASM-002: met for declared engine and security behavior

proved: strict learner projection excludes graders, accepted answers, private notes, feedback keys, reference solutions, and hidden tests
draft, unreviewed, and unsupported activities fail closed
creation exposes help counts but not help content
durable assistance level, solution reveal, sequential help step, and append-only receipt
same-request idempotent replay and cross-attempt request conflict
concurrent help allocation produces distinct sequential steps
receipt failure rolls assistance state back
submission ignores forged upward and downward client assistance claims
solution reveal requires a fresh attempt for independent evidence
deterministic MCQ, exact, set, numeric, and fill-gap grading
I-don't-know, progressive help, feedback, remediation, retry, next action, and content-report UI
placement route uses the same non-leaking learner projection
remainingLimitations: The 476 authored activity banks are draft, unreviewed, and exam-ineligible; real learner publication requires human review/materialization.
The browser proof uses deterministic API route fixtures; durable persistence and concurrency are proved separately in PostgreSQL integration tests.
Physical-device browser verification is outside this evidence run.
